note: Regional agri-services directory grouped by `cat`. Served same-origin and cached offline; the app falls back to a built-in set if this can't load. Botswana-led by default — edit/extend per country. Add `tel`/`whatsapp` to any entry to show a WhatsApp 'Contact' button; entries without a number show their `how` (how-to-access) note instead.

services.name: BAMB — Botswana Agricultural Marketing Board
services.desc: Buys & stores grain — maize, sorghum, pulses & sunflower — at announced producer prices.
services.how: Sell at your nearest BAMB depot or strategic grain reserve.

services.name: BMC — Botswana Meat Commission
services.desc: Buys cattle for slaughter & export, priced on weight and grade.
services.how: Book through a BMC feedlot or your local cattle agent.

services.name: Fresh-produce markets & retailers
services.desc: Sell vegetables & horticulture direct to vendors, supermarkets, schools & hotels.
services.how: Approach municipal markets or supply local retailers directly.

services.name: ISPAAD
services.desc: Integrated Support Programme for Arable Agriculture Development — subsidised seed, fertilizer & ploughing.
services.how: Register at your nearest Agricultural Extension Office.

services.name: LIMID
services.desc: Livestock Management & Infrastructure Development — grants for small stock, poultry, boreholes, kraals & fencing.
services.how: Apply through your District Agricultural Office.

services.name: CEDA
services.desc: Subsidised loans for agribusiness start-up & expansion.
services.how: Apply at a CEDA branch with a business plan — your farm records strengthen it.

services.name: NDB
services.desc: Agricultural loans for equipment, land development & livestock.
services.how: Visit an NDB branch; bring your cost & yield records.

services.name: Dept. of Veterinary Services (DVS)
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control, movement permits & livestock identification (BAITS).
services.how: Contact your local veterinary or extension office.

services.name: Private vets & agro-vet shops
services.desc: Vaccines, dipping chemicals, dewormers & animal treatment.
services.how: Find a registered vet or agro-vet in your district.

services.name: Agricultural Extension Office
services.desc: Free agronomic & livestock advice, training and programme registration.
services.how: Your nearest extension office is usually your first stop for everything.

services.name: Dept. of Agricultural Research (DAR)
services.desc: Recommended seed varieties, soil management & climate-smart practices.
services.how: Ask your extension officer for the latest DAR guidance.

services.name: Agro-dealers (seed, fertilizer, chemicals)
services.desc: Maize & sorghum seed, Compound D, LAN, urea, herbicides & fungicides.
services.how: Buy from licensed agro-dealers and ask for advice on application rates.

services.name: Mechanisation & irrigation hire
services.desc: Tractor, planter & sprayer hire; drip kits, pumps, piping & boreholes.
services.how: Hire through local service providers or your farmer co-operative.
